documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 3 step 9 implements the @daedaline/mcp-server skeleton: stdio MCP server, twelve ddl.* MCP Tools (real wiring for src/inbox/pause/resume/abort; JSON stubs for the rest), and resources for memory://, inbox://, and work-run-log://<taskId>. Adds @daedaline/mcp-server as a second workspace composer alongside @daedaline/cli; the no-horizontal-primitive-deps ESLint rule and the check:phase0a scaffold checker now whitelist both, with the carveout documented in BOOTSTRAP.md Phase 0a.

deferred_items.rationale: Full MCP transport hardening, auth, and non-stdio topologies are deferred to M2 per BOOTSTRAP step 9 and Q18.
ddl.init/run/feature/status/approve/src/memory/contracts/lint return JSON stubs until Phase 4 pipeline wiring lands, mirroring the CLI.
daedaline.mcp_server.readme_ergonomics LLM-judge contract requires the runner panel and refreshed contentHash anchors; deferred to the contract runner pass.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice stages diffs locally, preserves the in-loop human gate at the phase boundary, and extends the composer-carveout policy in lock-step in both the ESLint rule and the scaffold checker.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps mcp-server artifacts traceable; the composer carveout is documented in BOOTSTRAP.md Phase 0a so future agents discover the rule shape; the package preserves the meta-compatible stub exports so the meta package remains self-protected.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies BOOTSTRAP Phase 3 step 9 (stdio MCP skeleton + MVP ddl.* tools + src/memory/src/inbox/run-log resources) while honoring the Q18 M2 deferral on full wire-up.
